title: carduus uncinatus subsp. uncinatus
intro: Carduus uncinatus subsp. uncinatus, also known as the spiny plumeless thistle or prickly thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its thorny stems and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Carduus uncinatus subsp. uncinatus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Carduus uncinatus subsp. uncinatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
